channel.title: Ubuntu on ExitCode0
channel.description: Recent content in Ubuntu on ExitCode0

item.title: Complete 2024 Guide: How to expand a Ubuntu LVM LV to use all space on the PV
item.description: Expand a Ubuntu LVM logical volume to fill available physical drive space using lvextend and resize2fs. Reclaim free space when the root partition reaches capacity.

item.title: How to upgrade Ubuntu from 18.04 to 20.04
item.description: Upgrade Ubuntu 18.04 LTS to 20.04 LTS in-place using do-release-upgrade. Preserve installed packages and configuration during a major release upgrade.

item.title: Setup the Nextcloud Snap Package with HTTPS and a separate data path
item.description: Install Nextcloud snap on Ubuntu with Let's Encrypt HTTPS and a separate data mount. Self-hosted cloud storage with automatic certificate renewal and external HDD support.

item.title: Ubuntu 19.10 - How to upgrade python 2.7 to python 3.7
item.description: Upgrade Python default version on Ubuntu 19.10 from 2.7 to 3.7. Configure interpreter priority and resolve pip compatibility issues on a modern Ubuntu release.
